headline: MongoDB climbs after first-quarter beat and stronger full-year guidance (MDB)
summary: Shares advance as results exceed expectationsMongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) gained more than 4% in pre-market trading on Friday, adding to a 10. 6% rise from the previous session, after the database software provider delivered first-quarter fiscal 2027 results that surpassed analyst forecasts across key financial metrics and increased its outlook for the full year.

headline: RealTek sees mixed demand trends as second-half visibility remains limited (RLTQY)
summary: Morgan Stanley flags uncertainty beyond the first halfMorgan Stanley analysts believe RealTek Semiconductor (USOTC:RLTQY) faces a less predictable operating environment in the second half of 2026, despite solid demand trends across several end markets. Following discussions at the Asia AI Summit, the brokerage said visibility for the remainder of the year remains limited, with business conditions expected to be less favourable than those seen during the first six months of 2026.

headline: Dell stock skyrockets 32%, heads for best day ever as AI server revenue soars
summary: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.
